Home.welcome: Welcome to our app generation PoC site

Common.backMessage: All unsaved messages will be lost. Are you sure you want to return to the list?
Common.deleteMessage: Are you sure you want to delete this {entity}? Deleted data cannot be recovered.

Auth.haveAccount: Already have an account? Sign in
Auth.emailInUse: Email address is already in use
Auth.mfaHelper: Open your authenticator app and enter the current code, or use a recovery code.
Auth.mfaRequired: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app to finish signing in.
Auth.mfaInvalid: That code did not match. Try again with a fresh 6-digit code, or use a recovery code.

Mfa.title: Two-factor authentication
Mfa.disabledIntro: Add a second factor to your account. You will need an authenticator app (Google Authenticator, 1Password, Authy, ...).
Mfa.pendingIntro: Scan the QR code with your authenticator app, or copy the secret manually. Then enter the 6-digit code below to confirm.
Mfa.recoveryWarning: Save these recovery codes somewhere safe. Each can be used once if you lose access to your authenticator. They will not be shown again.
Mfa.enabledStatus: Two-factor authentication is enabled on this account.
Mfa.disableIntro: To turn MFA off, enter a current 6-digit code (or a recovery code).
Mfa.regenerateIntro: Enter your current TOTP code or a recovery code to generate new codes. Old codes will be invalidated.
Mfa.regenerateSuccess: Recovery codes regenerated. Save these codes — they will not be shown again.

Setting.title: Account settings
Setting.mfaBody: Enable a second factor for credentials sign-in.
Setting.accountsBody: Manage which providers can sign you into this account.

LinkedAccounts.title: Connected accounts
LinkedAccounts.intro: These providers can sign you into this account. You can connect another OAuth provider with the same email, or detach one as long as you keep at least one way to sign in.
LinkedAccounts.emptyState: No OAuth providers are connected yet.
LinkedAccounts.cannotDetach: Removing this would leave you with no way to sign in.
LinkedAccounts.passwordlessNotice: This is your only sign-in method. Set a password on the account before detaching it.
LinkedAccounts.errorLastSignInMethod: Cannot detach: you would no longer be able to sign in.
LinkedAccounts.errorUnknown: Something went wrong. Please try again.
